treatment_information.treatment_response: One vessel coronary artery disease was identified; the blockage was too complex for stenting, requiring medication management.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient transferred for further management of chest pain
Coronary catheterization performed, revealing single vessel coronary artery disease

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Ongoing management with cardiologist for coronary disease
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: The patient was informed that managing coronary disease through medications is essential for health.
